headline: 1 Unpopular Stock That Should Get More Attention and 2 We Question
summary: Wall Street has issued downbeat forecasts for the stocks in this article. These predictions are rare - financial institutions typically hesitate to say bad things about a company because it can jeopardize their other revenue-generating business lines like M&A advisory.

headline: Caterpillar Inc. (CAT) Asserts Commitment to Shareholder Value Amid Management Change
summary: Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE: CAT) is one of the top S&P 500 stocks by index weight. On April 8, Caterpillar Inc. (NYSE:CAT) reiterated its quarterly dividend of $1.51 per share, translating to an annualized dividend of $6.04 per share. The dividend is to be paid on May 19, to shareholders of record at the close of […]

headline: GE Vernova Defies Odds and Surpasses GE Aerospace in Market Value
summary: GE Vernova  was supposed to be the run of the General Electric breakup litter.  Instead, it now has a larger market cap than GE Aerospace.  On Wednesday, the company’s market value exceeded GE Aerospace’s for the first time.

headline: GE Vernova Is Setting Records. This Might Be the Most Surprising One.
summary: Power-generation technology provider  GE Vernova  remains the best pick-and-shovel stock to play the artificial-intelligence boom.  On Wednesday, the company’s market value exceeded  GE Aerospace’s  for the first time.  GE Aerospace stock was down about 4% to just over $275 a share.
